headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -82.8)
key_insights: Fears trending up 82% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 155 quotes and 116 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and irritation very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 54.7 sits in the upper third of the 133-day range, showing elevated but not extreme levels.

• Optimism crashed from yesterday's positive 3.2 to -31.1, while fears improved significantly from their very low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
